name: kubernetes-minikube-dev
postCreateCommand:
minikube delete --purge >/dev/null 2>&1 || true && \
minikube start \
  --driver=docker \
  --apiserver-port=8443 \
 --ports=0.0.0.0:33333:8443 \
  --apiserver-ips=$(hostname -i) \
  --listen-address=0.0.0.0 \
  --memory=4096 \
  --cpus=2 \
  --force && \
mkdir -p /root/export-kube && \
kubectl config view --raw > /root/export-kube/config && \
cp ~/.minikube/ca.crt /root/export-kube/ && \
cp ~/.minikube/profiles/minikube/client.crt /root/export-kube/ && \
cp ~/.minikube/profiles/minikube/client.key /root/export-kube/ && \
echo 'kubeconfig exported to /root/export-kube/'
